title: JMeter Load Test (Influx)
description: OpenLoadHub JMeter Influx dashboard. Filters by run_id mapped to the built-in jmeter/application tag and queries the native jmeter measurement.

list.label: Run ID
list.name: run_id
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "jmeter" WITH KEY = "application"

list.label: Request
list.name: request
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "jmeter" WITH KEY = "transaction" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" !~ /^(all|internal)$/

list.name: Test Start
list.query: SELECT * FROM testStartEnd WHERE "runId" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND type='started'

list.name: Test End
list.query: SELECT * FROM testStartEnd WHERE "runId" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND type='finished'

panels.content: The following panels show aggregated metrics for all requests

targets.query: SELECT sum("started_threads") FROM (SELECT max("startedT") AS "started_threads" FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'internal' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "nodeName")
SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'all' AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT 1 - sum("countError")/sum("count") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'all' AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("count") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'all' AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("countError")/sum("count") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'all' AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)

SELECT sum("started_threads") FROM (SELECT max("startedT") AS "started_threads" FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'internal' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s), "nodeName" fill(null)) GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" = 'all' AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)

SELECT sum("count") as Count, mean("avg") as Avg, min("min") as Min, median("avg") as Median, median("pct90.0") as "90%", median("pct95.0") as "95%", median("pct99.0") as "99%", max("max") as Max FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND "transaction" !~ /^(all|internal)$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"

SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND "transaction" !~ /^(all|internal)$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s), "transaction" fill(null)

SELECT mean("avg") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND "transaction" !~ /^(all|internal)$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s), "transaction" fill(null)

panels.title: Endpoint Avg Response Time by API

targets.query: SELECT mean("pct95.0") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND "transaction" !~ /^(all|internal)$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s), "transaction" fill(null)

panels.title: Endpoint P95 Response Time by API

targets.query: SELECT mean("pct99.0") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND "transaction" !~ /^(all|internal)$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s), "transaction" fill(null)

panels.title: Endpoint P99 Response Time by API

panels.content: The following panels remain request-specific drilldown views for "[[request]]"

targets.query: SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("count") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT mean("avg") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT mean("pct90.0") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT mean("pct95.0") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT mean("pct99.0") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT max("max") FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM "jmeter" WHERE "application" =~ /^$run_id$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$request$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time([[aggregation]]s) fill(null)
